# Clawbrowser

> Clawbrowser is a Chromium-based browser with managed sessions, fingerprint profiles, and profile-bound proxy routing for AI agent automation and multi-account management.

## What Clawbrowser does

Clawbrowser is a Chromium fork with native browser patches for supported browser fingerprint surfaces such as Canvas, WebGL, AudioContext, navigator properties, screen metrics, fonts, timezone, language, battery, plugins, media devices, WebRTC behavior, and speech voices. The public launcher manages named browser sessions and exposes a standard Chrome DevTools Protocol (CDP) endpoint for Playwright, Puppeteer, and other CDP-based automation tools.

For proxy-backed fingerprint profiles, proxy credentials and geo metadata are bundled with the generated profile. Browser flags can be passed after `--` when a user needs direct fingerprint, country, city, or connection-type targeting.

Clawbrowser does not claim to handle TLS/JA3 fingerprinting.

## Key pages

- Homepage: https://clawbrowser.ai
- Documentation: https://clawbrowser.ai/docs
- Blog: https://clawbrowser.ai/blog
- GitHub: https://github.com/clawbrowser/clawbrowser
- Releases: https://github.com/clawbrowser/clawbrowser/releases
- API key dashboard: https://app.clawbrowser.ai

## Install

curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/clawbrowser/clawbrowser/main/scripts/install.sh | bash -s -- claude

Targets: claude, codex, gemini, all

## CLI

- `clawbrowser start --session <name> -- <url>` starts or reattaches to a managed browser session.
- `clawbrowser endpoint --session <name>` prints the local CDP endpoint.
- `clawbrowser status --session <name>` prints session status.
- `clawbrowser rotate --session <name>` restarts the managed session and passes `--regenerate` to the browser.
- `clawbrowser stop --session <name>` stops the session.
- `clawbrowser list --session <name>` lists cached browser profiles as JSON.

## Use cases

- AI agent browser automation with profile isolation
- Multi-account browser session management
- Web automation with managed browser fingerprint profiles
- CDP automation with Playwright, Puppeteer, and compatible tools

## Licensing

Clawbrowser is commercial software. An API key is required when a new fingerprint profile must be generated. Obtain one at https://app.clawbrowser.ai.
